questions: GH #199: why does skill-entry governance-health hard-fail on single-lineage manual-era ledger residuals?

findings.root: seal write boundary asserts no UTF-8/ASCII validity; ledger_hash.content_hash hashes raw bytes (ledger_hash.py:25-30)
findings.impact: invalid-UTF-8 ledger unreadable; governance_health DAMAGED at :157 before chain verify
INCOMPLETE false-positive on prose; ledger path :132-140 already correct

findings.root: skill-entry calls strict verify(); both tolerance paths require dup-previous_hash (ledger_hash.py:281-297)
findings.impact: single-lineage residuals FAIL+taint while verify_post_anchor (:390) tolerates band for release gates
